description_long: This gatehouse features an ornate stone facade with intricate carvings, including sculpted figures and decorative reliefs above a large, arched wooden double door. The entryway is framed by two prominent columns and topped with a detailed pediment, showcasing classical architectural motifs. The stonework is weathered, giving the structure a historic and monumental appearance. The wooden doors are paneled and reinforced, suggesting durability and security. There are no visible windows on the main facade, emphasizing the solid and protective nature of the gatehouse. The overall design is grand and imposing, suitable for a public or institutional building.
description: A grand, ornately carved stone gatehouse with a large arched wooden double door and classical decorative elements. The facade is richly detailed and imposing, with no visible windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed stone carvings, sculpted figures, and the large arched wooden double door.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the stone structure and the protrusion of the entryway elements.
description_view_2: Frontal view similar to view 0, highlighting the symmetry and full extent of the decorative facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth of the stonework and the profile of the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched stone doorway with large paneled wooden double doors and sculpted reliefs.
attribute_window_placement: No visible windows on the facade.
